headline: Why Celestica (TSX:CLS) Is Up 8.2% After Teaming With AMD On Helios AI Networking Switches
summary: In March 2026, AMD announced a collaboration with Celestica to develop and manufacture scale-up networking switches for the Helios rack-scale AI platform, using Open Compute Project, Open-Rack-Wide designs and Ultra Accelerator Link over Ethernet to connect next-generation AMD Instinct MI450 Series GPUs across large AI clusters. This partnership highlights how Celestica is moving further up the AI infrastructure stack by combining its design and manufacturing strengths with AMD’s compute...

headline: Ecolab to buy KKR-backed CoolIT for $4.75 billion amid AI data center boom
summary: Ecolab said on Friday it would acquire KKR-backed CoolIT Systems ‌for about $4.75 billion in cash, as ‌it seeks to capitalize on surging demand for liquid cooling ​in artificial intelligence-driven data centers. Shares of the water management company were down 1% in premarket trading. The deal, expected to close in ‌the third quarter ⁠of 2026, comes as technology companies ramp up spending on AI infrastructure, ⁠driving a shift from traditional air cooling to more efficient liquid-based systems capable of ​handling higher ​chip densities and ​power loads.
